entry.title: Integrating PostHog product analytics with Docusaurus v2 on GitHub Pages
entry.summary: I integrated PostHog analytics into this website today. I decided to do so after reading Gergely Orosz's Stats page on his blog The Pragmatic Engineer. He had installed Plausible analytics and made his analytics dashboard public. I thought that was cool and wanted to do the same.

entry.title: Top 3 reasons why you should start investing with StashAway today!
entry.summary: Disclaimer: This post is not sponsored, and does not constitute financial advice of any form (I bet you know better than me). Read at your own discretion!

entry.title: GitHub Action for Docusaurus
entry.summary: I got tired of deploying my Docusaurus website to GitHub Pages manually, and decided to do something about it using GitHub Action.

entry.title: STACK 2020 Developers Conference
entry.summary: STACK 2020 Developers Conference is GovTech’s flagship conference and the largest government-led developers event in Singapore that connects government, industry and the tech community.
